name: KorYor11-LOT
query:
select DATE(SII.creation) as 'creation_date', 
CASE 
    	WHEN SI.customer = 'ลูกค้าทั่วไป' then SI.patient
	ELSE SI.customer
END as 'patient', SII.item_code as 'item_name', I.generic_name as 'generic_name',  SII.qty, SII.uom, 
B.batch_id as 'lot2',
TRIM(REPLACE(B.batch_id, SUBSTRING(B.batch_id, LOCATE('[', B.batch_id), LOCATE(']', B.batch_id) - LOCATE('[', B.batch_id) + 1), '')) AS lot,
 B.expiry_date as 'exp', PII.qty as 'purchase_qty', PO.supplier, PO.transaction_date as 'receive_date'
from `tabItem` I 
join `tabSales Invoice Item` SII on I.item_code = SII.item_code 
join `tabSales Invoice` SI on SI.name = SII.parent
join `tabPurchase Invoice Item` PII on PII.item_code = SII.item_code and PII.batch_no = PII.batch_no
join `tabPurchase Order Item` POI on POI.name = PII.po_detail
join `tabPurchase Order` PO on PO.name = POI.parent
join `tabBatch` B on B.name = SII.batch_no
where I.item_code = %(item_code)s 
and B.batch_id = %(batch_no)s
